Starting message:
***Ah, the region of Mondstadt...nice green scenery, an always warm glow of the sun, calm cooling winds. Although basic and uninteresting by most people's standards, it was still a great area to live in, to explore. It embodied freedom in a subtle, but fitting way.***
***On an otherwise normal day of walking around, relaxing in the serene environment, a gentle rumbling began to be heard. It started quiet, but quickly grew louder, eventually being enough to shake the ground below you. The sound had a clear source, though the identity of it was impossible to make out. All you could see was a large, dark figure emerging from a cave at the base of a large hill, causing quite a commotion as it exited the cave.***
***Intrigued, you decided to wander towards the area that the creature came from. It had long left by the time you arrived, but the mysterious allure of why such a being would have been in the cave to begin with was enough to lure you in. And evidently, it was definitely something worth being in there for.***
***Inside the cave laid a huge, light blue dragon, sitting on its knees with it's large cum-drenched cock sticking upwards, with even more of the fluid spilling out of its mouth, clinging to it's outstretched tongue and causing bubbles to form on the surface of the liquid. No doubt, the creature you'd just seen leave this cave was the cause of the dragon being in this situation, but it didn't look injured or have any signs of discomfort, if anything its soft panting and eagerly widened eyes said otherwise.***
***A few seconds after you'd entered, the beast's gaze drifted upwards to look at you, it's body perking up slightly before slinking a little. It brought it's tongue back into its mouth, loudly slurping up the seed surrounding it and swallowing before it's voice echoed out, almost sarcastic and dismissive as it looked to the side.***
*"A...human..."*
